notFound.title: Project not found
notFound.description: The project you're looking for doesn't exist.

shared.brief: Clarifying the problem, the audience and the constraints before writing a single line of code — the brief keeps the whole team pointed at the same outcome.
shared.research: User interviews, competitive analysis and heuristic reviews surface the real jobs to be done and the biggest opportunities to differentiate the product.

step1.title: Discover
step1.description: Stakeholder interviews, benchmarks and information architecture.

step2.title: Design
step2.description: Wireframes, prototypes and a scalable design system in Figma.

step3.title: Deliver
step3.description: Front-end implementation, QA, hand-off and continuous improvement.

shared.result: The final product ships with measurable improvements to the metrics that mattered — usability scores, conversion and team velocity — and a design system the team can keep evolving.

websiteEkovitra.title: Website Ekovitra
websiteEkovitra.shortDescription: Responsive corporate website showcasing sustainable construction solutions and strengthening the company's digital presence.
websiteEkovitra.fullDescription: Designed and developed a fully responsive website for a sustainable construction company based in Manaus, Brazil. The project focused on creating a modern digital experience that communicates the company's commitment to innovation, sustainability, and high-quality construction through intuitive navigation, clean visuals, and optimized performance across all devices.
websiteEkovitra.deliverables: UX Research, UI Design, Responsive Development, React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui

memorioApp.title: Memório App
memorioApp.shortDescription: A digital journaling app designed to help users record their emotions, daily reflections, and meaningful memories in one place.
memorioApp.fullDescription: Designed the UX/UI for Memório, a digital journaling application created as an academic project during the Digital Design program at FIAP. The app was designed to provide a simple and welcoming space for users to record their daily emotions, write personal reflections, and save meaningful moments through photos. The project focused on creating an intuitive and emotionally engaging experience, supported by a warm visual identity, clear information hierarchy, and user-friendly interactions. All interface screens and visual solutions were designed in Figma.
memorioApp.deliverables: UX/UI Design, User Interface Design, Interaction Design, Visual Design, Figma

helenaDuarteWebsite.title: Helena Duarte Website
helenaDuarteWebsite.shortDescription: A fictional professional website combining editorial design and responsive development for a business law and data protection specialist.
helenaDuarteWebsite.fullDescription: Designed and developed a fictional professional website for Helena Duarte, a fictional lawyer specializing in Business Law and Data Protection. The project was created as a portfolio demonstration, with the character, portrait, credentials, contact information, publications, and events developed exclusively for the concept. The website was designed to communicate authority, expertise, and trust through a refined visual identity, editorial-inspired typography, clear content hierarchy, and responsive layouts across desktop and mobile devices. I was responsible for both the interface design and the front-end implementation.
helenaDuarteWebsite.deliverables: UX/UI Design, Responsive Web Design, Front-End Development, React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui

sensenGamesWebsite.title: Sensen Games Website
sensenGamesWebsite.shortDescription: A responsive official website for a Brazilian indie game studio, showcasing its games, story, and creative identity to a global audience.
sensenGamesWebsite.fullDescription: Collaboratively designed and developed the official website for Sensen Games, a Brazilian indie game studio founded by two brothers who have shared a passion for video games since the Super Nintendo and PlayStation eras. The project was developed as part of the Bolsa Futuro Digital program, an initiative by Softex in partnership with the Brazilian Ministry of Education, during a Front-End Development training program focused on React. The website was created for the real studio and designed to communicate its identity, history, and games through an engaging and responsive digital experience. The project included multilingual support in Portuguese and English, SPA navigation, SEO optimization, responsive interfaces, and a contact form with email integration. Development was carried out as part of a collaborative team.
sensenGamesWebsite.deliverables: Front-End Development, Responsive Web Design, React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, React Router DOM, i18next, React Helmet Async, Lucide React, EmailJS

natPlusChatbot.title: Nat+ Chatbot
natPlusChatbot.shortDescription: A conversational AI concept designed to transform Natura's virtual assistant into a personalized and empathetic digital beauty consultant.
natPlusChatbot.fullDescription: Collaboratively designed and prototyped Nat+, a conversational AI concept developed for the 2025 FIAP Challenge in partnership with Natura. The project proposed an evolution of Natura's existing virtual assistant, transforming it from a primarily operational tool into a personalized digital beauty consultant capable of understanding users, providing product recommendations, and supporting their shopping journey with a more human and empathetic experience. The concept explored personalized skincare and beauty recommendations based on users' preferences, routines, goals, and ingredients they wish to avoid, as well as features such as skin tone analysis, personalized product suggestions, post-purchase follow-ups, and proactive alerts. I was primarily responsible for UX/UI Design, creating the chatbot interfaces and interaction flows. I also implemented the designed experience as a functional chatbot prototype using GPTMaker, allowing the concept and conversational flows to be tested in practice.
natPlusChatbot.deliverables: UX/UI Design, Conversational Design, Interaction Design, User Flows, Chatbot Prototyping, GPTMaker, Figma

brotaiPlatform.title: Brotaí Platform
brotaiPlatform.shortDescription: A digital platform designed to simplify access to educational programs, course enrollment, attendance management, and administrative workflows for the Brotaí program.
brotaiPlatform.fullDescription: Collaboratively designed and developed a digital platform for Brotaí, a social program by the Municipality of Niterói that provides free cultural and technical education to the local community. The platform was created to centralize information about the program and simplify the enrollment process for participants, while also providing dedicated workflows for teachers and program managers. Teachers can access their classes, register and view student attendance, and manage class-related information. Program managers can access relevant data, register information, and perform administrative tasks through an accessible centralized system. Developed as part of a Technology Residency within the Bolsa Futuro Digital program, an initiative by Softex with support from Brazil's Ministry of Education. My primary role was Front-End Developer, contributing to the development of the interface and also supporting Back-End development and data modeling. The project is currently in progress and scheduled for deployment.
brotaiPlatform.deliverables: Front-End Development, Back-End Development, React, Vite, JavaScript, Node.js, Prisma ORM, SQLite3, Lucide React
